subject: Open to a chat about platform infra at Stripe?
body:
Hi,

I came across your profile and was really impressed by your work on distributed systems. We have a Staff Platform Infrastructure role opening up at Stripe that I think could be a great fit — owns the core service-to-service mesh, ~$multi-year roadmap, lots of autonomy.

Would you be open to a quick 15-min intro call this week?

Best,
Mike Taylor
Sr. Technical Recruiter, Stripe
